title: "Genius Party" - Atsuko Fukushima
overview: In a barren desert, a human-like figure with a bird-like mask and appendages interacts with sentient egg-like stones in what seems like a symbiotic relationship.

title: "Shanghai Dragon" - Shōji Kawamori
overview: A young Chinese boy finds a futuristic device that can make his own drawings come to life, but it is part of a plan by humans from centuries in the future to save their civilization.

title: "Deathtic 4" - Shinji Kimura
overview: A boy in world of zombies finds a living frog that falls from the sky and he tries to return the creature to its own world.

title: "Doorbell" - Yoji Fukuyama
overview: A young man encounters other versions of himself causing confusion about his own existence.

title: "Limit Cycle" - Hideki Futamura
overview: A salary man, seemingly trapped in an endless cycle of work, makes an existential examination of the world. Illustrated in the manner of a psychedelic hallucination.

title: "Happy Machine" - Masaaki Yuasa
overview: An infant suddenly discovers that everything in its nursery is fake and goes out into the world outside where it encounters a range of alien like creatures, some friendly and some not.

title: "Baby Blue" - Shinichirō Watanabe
overview: A bittersweet story about two high-school students and long-time friends who skip school for a day before one leaves for another city.
